title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mindspace Business Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Mindspace Business Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindspace Business Parks REIT:
Mindspace Business Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindspace Business Parks REIT!
